name: Bean & Franks Soup
recipeIngredient: 28 ounces Baked Beans in Brown Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the carrots, onions, and garlic in butter over medium heat until crisp and tender.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients except cheese.
3. Heat over medium heat for a few minutes, stirring occasionally until hot.
4. Serve with shredded cheese on top.
